genomic_properties.size_and_density: Minimal Essential MHC. Extremely compact genomic structure compared to mammals.
genomic_properties.evolutionary_tradeoff: High co-regulation efficiency leads to rapid antigen presentation, but tight linkage increases population vulnerability.

locus_and_region_mappings.molecular_structure: Encodes polymorphic alpha-chains non-covalently linked to beta-2 microglobulin.
locus_and_region_mappings.functional_pathway: Presents endogenous viral peptide fragments directly to CD8+ cytotoxic T lymphocytes (CTLs).

locus_and_region_mappings.molecular_structure: Encodes highly polymorphic alpha and beta chain heterodimers.
locus_and_region_mappings.functional_pathway: Expressed on professional antigen-presenting cells; presents exogenous antigens to CD4+ T-helper cells.
Expressed on erythrocytes, intestinal epithelial boundaries, and immune stromal matrices.

B21_haplotype.phenotypic_expression: Maximum genetic resistance to Marek's Disease Virus (MDV).
B21_haplotype.cellular_mechanism: Triggers highly efficient surface presentation of viral antigens during early lytic phase.

B19_haplotype.phenotypic_expression: Extreme clinical susceptibility to Marek's Disease Virus (MDV).
B19_haplotype.cellular_mechanism: Displays defective binding kinetics for MDV peptide fragments, allowing unrestricted viral replication.

heterophils.functional_definition: Primary avian polymorphonuclear (PMN) granulocyte, acting as immediate cellular responder.
heterophils.enzymatic_blindspot: Completely devoid of myeloperoxidase (MPO); unable to generate respiratory bursts.
heterophils.destruction_mechanism: Relies on oxygen-independent phagocytosis using avian beta-defensins (AvBDs), lysozymes, and cationic bactericidal proteins.

macrophages.functional_role: Phagocytosis, antigen processing, and synthesis of reactive oxygen species (ROS).
macrophages.activation_marker: Heavy production of Nitric Oxide (NO) induced by Interferon-gamma (IFN-γ).

toll_like_receptors_tlr_matrix.ligand_target: Double-stranded RNA (dsRNA) from active viral replication.
toll_like_receptors_tlr_matrix.downstream_cascade: Triggers TRIF signaling, forcing secretion of Type I Interferons (IFN-α/β).
Activates MyD88-dependent pathways, releasing pro-inflammatory cytokines.
Avian homolog to mammalian TLR9; optimizes detection of bacterial chromosomal structures.

bursa_of_fabricius.organ_type: Primary lymphoid organ for B-cell maturation.
bursa_of_fabricius.diversification_mechanism: Gene Conversion. Chickens possess only a single functional V and J gene locus. Diversification occurs by copy-pasting nucleotide segments from upstream pseudo-genes.

thymus.organ_type: Primary lymphoid organ for T-cell maturation.

selection_mechanisms.outcome: Validation of TCR affinity for self-MHC complexes.
Clonal deletion of autoreactive T-cell clones.

thymus.metabolic_cost: Over 95% attrition rate during standard selection cycles.

t_cell_receptor_lineages.population_dynamics: Abundant in young chicks (20-50% of circulating pool); no MHC presentation required.
t_cell_receptor_lineages.tissue_homing: Mucosal intraepithelial linings, splenic red pulp, intestinal lamina propria.

t_cell_receptor_lineages.population_dynamics: Predominant T-lymphocyte in mature peripheral lymphoid organs.
Minor specialized subset unique to avian families.

type_i.action: Upregulates Mx genes and PKR pathways, locking neighboring cells in antiviral state.

type_ii.secreted_by: NK cells, Th1 CD4+ cells, activated CD8+ CTLs.
type_ii.action: Upregulates MHC Class I and II expression; absolute activator for macrophage phagocytic kinetics.

interleukins.impact: Induces acute-phase protein pathways and systemic metabolic shifts.
Drives clonal expansion of antigen-primed T-lymphocytes.
Downregulates active inflammatory cascades, protecting mucosal tissues.

chemokines.function: Orchestrates accelerated chemotaxis of heterophils to focal points of infection.

harderian_gland.location: Retrobulbar space of the orbital cavity.
harderian_gland.function: Dominant effector site for ocular and upper respiratory mucosal protection. Dense plasma cells secreting sIgA.

cecal_tonsils.location: Junction of the ceca and ileum.
cecal_tonsils.function: Largest organized gut-associated lymphoid tissue (GALT) hub in birds.

splenic_white_pulp.function: Systemic blood filter for intravascular bacterial and viral clearance.
